text: vLLM (Kwon et al. 2023, UC Berkeley, SOSP) introduces PagedAttention — a virtual memory-inspired attention algorithm that reduces memory waste from KV-cache fragmentation by 80%, achieving 24× higher throughput than HuggingFace Transformers.

FlashAttention (Dao et al. 2022, NeurIPS) reduces attention memory from O(N²) to O(N) via IO-aware tiling, and FlashAttention-2 (2023) further optimizes parallelism, achieving 2-4× speedup with no approximation.
LLM.int8() (Dettmers et al. 2022, NeurIPS) enables 8-bit matrix multiplication for transformers with zero performance degradation by handling outlier features in FP16 and the rest in INT8.
